cadence_note: IDB's open data portal (data.iadb.org, CKAN) publishes no release calendar, and the datasets are mostly one-off companions to research publications that are rarely revised after release. Package metadata_modified arrives in irregular bulk bursts rather than on a cycle (433 packages in 2025-12 and 359 in 2026-06, vs 1-21 in most other months; 5 in 2026-07 as of 2026-07-15). What actually moves is the catalog size: 1532 packages at 2026-07-15, up from ~1386 at research time, so new packages are the thing worth re-observing. 7 days is therefore a polling compromise chosen for catalog growth, NOT a source-published schedule -- there is none to cite.
